channel.title: hugo on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in hugo on IT notes

item.title: Hugo hosting on github using 2 repositories
item.description: This setup requires two separate repos, one for Hugo’s content, and a second one that will be a git submodule with the public folder’s content in it. Step by step: Create on Github <your-project>-hugo repository (it will host Hugo’s content) Create on GitHub <username>.github.io repository (it will host the public folder: the static website) git clone <your-project>-hugo-url && cd <your-project>-hugo Make your website work locally (hugo server)
